title: cordula praestans
intro: Cordula praestans, also known as Cordyceps praestans, is a type of fungus that grows on caterpillars, particularly those of the Hepialidae family. This fungus is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Cordyceps praestans include improved cardiovascular function, enhanced exercise performance, and increased protection against oxidative stress. It can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, allowing for various forms of consumption for its medicinal and health benefits.
